name: FacetedBrep
summary: The FacetedBrep class defines a faceted BREP.

constructors.name: FacetedBrep
constructors.signature: public FacetedBrep(Vector[] vertices, int[][] outerWires, IDictionary<int, int[][]> innerWires)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FacetedBrep class.

params.name: vertices
params.doc: Vector of the faceted brep vertices.

params.name: outerWires
params.doc: outerWires is an array of integer arrays, providing indices in the traversing order for each outer loop/wire. The indices correspond to the position of a vertex in the vertices array."

params.name: innerWires
params.doc: innerWires is an array of integer arrays, providing indices in the traversing order for each inner loop/wire. The dictionary key for the innerWires is the Face index (0-origin). The indices correspond to the position of a vertex in the vertices array."

constructors.name: FacetedBrep
constructors.signature: public FacetedBrep(Vector[] vertices, int[][] outerWires, IDictionary<int, int[][]> innerWires, IList<IndirectPolymeshEdge> edges)
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the FacetedBrep class.

params.name: vertices
params.doc: Vector of the faceted brep vertices.

params.name: outerWires
params.doc: outerWires is an array of integer arrays, providing indices in the traversing order for each outer loop/wire. The indices correspond to the position of a vertex in the vertices array."

params.name: innerWires
params.doc: innerWires is an array of integer arrays, providing indices in the traversing order for each inner loop/wire. The dictionary key for the innerWires is the Face index (0-origin). The indices correspond to the position of a vertex in the vertices array."

params.name: edges
params.doc: The edge information as indirect edges.

methods.name: CheckForTwoManifold
methods.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this instance is 2-manifold.

returns.doc: true if this instance is 2-manifold; otherwise false.

methods.name: GetInnerFace
methods.summary: Gets the inner face at the specified index.

returns.doc: The array of vertex indexes for the inner face.

methods.name: GetInnerFaceCount
methods.summary: Gets the inner face count of the outer face at the specified index.

returns.doc: The count of inner faces for the outer face.

methods.name: GetOuterFace
methods.summary: Gets the outer face at the specified index.

returns.doc: The array of vertex indexes for the outer face.
